narrative:
Tiffin West (precinct in Adams County) has 749 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
